usefulness_evaluation.narrative: This was a structural adversarial test, not a user experience evaluation. All 10 edge-case tests passed: validation interceptor correctly rejects malformed IDs, empty/oversized fields, and invalid status transitions. Error codes are precise (INVALID_ARGUMENT vs NOT_FOUND vs FAILED_PRECONDITION). DeleteBooking on non-existent ID is idempotent (silent success). No panics or 500s observed.
